name: bauhly-content-generator
description: Multi-agent Instagram content generator: turn a high-level strategy + your photos into ready-to-post posts, carousels and reel covers.

scripts.demo: npm run sample-assets && npm run generate -- --strategy "Grow a warm, minimal specialty-coffee brand for young urban professionals. Educational + aspirational. Drive footfall to our new store." --assets ./sample-assets --formats post,carousel,reel
